title: Mise products render worker output
description: An Aphrodite product-image render result. Mirrors app/products.create_render: a source asset, a free-form spec, the generated file, and the ACTUAL per-call cost the deterministic budget cap sums against. A render is EXPLICIT_COMMIT review state — never published automatically; a human approves, confirms consent/rights (audit §13.5), then exports.

source_asset_id.description: The source photo this variant was rendered from.

kind.description: What was requested (variant catalogue is operator-defined).

spec.description: JSON spec / prompt of the render.

output_path.description: Where the generated file landed, if any.

cost_usd.description: ACTUAL spend for this render; refused if it would exceed MISE_PRODUCTS_BUDGET_USD.
